title: Grade 4 Activities
description: Place value, operations, fractions, decimals, and geometry

levels.title: Place Value, Rounding & Add/Sub Algorithms
levels.goal: Represent, compare, and round numbers to 1,000,000 and add/subtract multi-digit numbers with meaning.
skills: Read/write in standard and expanded form
Add and subtract multi-digit numbers with regrouping

activities.title: Place Value to 1,000,000 Telescope
activities.description: Build big numbers using a place-value chart.

activities.title: Expanded Form Million Match
activities.description: Match a number to its expanded form.

activities.title: Compare & Order Big Numbers
activities.description: Compare and sort large numbers.

activities.title: Round Anywhere
activities.description: Round a number to the nearest 10, 100, 1,000, 10,000, or 100,000.

activities.title: Add & Subtract Multi-Digit
activities.description: Add and subtract big numbers with regrouping.

activities.title: Estimate First
activities.description: Estimate by rounding, then solve exactly.

activities.title: Number Line Zoom
activities.description: Place a number on a zoomed number line.

activities.title: Two-Step Add/Sub Stories
activities.description: Solve short stories with big numbers.

levels.title: Factors, Multiples & Multi-Digit Multiply/Divide
levels.goal: Use structure (factors/multiples) and models to multiply and divide larger numbers, then connect to efficient methods.
skills: Multiply: area model to partial products to algorithm
Divide: place-value reasoning to partial quotients

activities.title: Factor Pairs Garden
activities.description: Grow rectangles to find factor pairs.

activities.title: Prime or Composite Sort
activities.description: Sort numbers into prime or composite.

activities.title: Area Model Multiply
activities.description: Multiply using a rectangle split into tens and ones.

activities.title: Partial Products Builder
activities.description: Build partial products and add them up.

activities.title: Multi-Digit Multiplication
activities.description: Practice 2-digit by 2-digit multiplication.

activities.title: Divide with Place Value
activities.description: Share a big number into equal groups.

activities.title: Remainder Stories
activities.description: Decide what the remainder means in a story.

activities.title: Multi-Step Multiply/Divide Problems
activities.description: Solve 1-2 step word problems with multiply and divide.

levels.title: Fractions & Mixed Numbers
levels.goal: Understand fractions as numbers, find equivalent fractions, compare them, and add/subtract with like denominators.
skills: Multiply a fraction by a whole number

activities.title: Fraction Number Line Walk
activities.description: Place fractions on number lines (0-1 and 0-2).

activities.title: Equivalent Fractions Builder
activities.description: Build equivalent fractions with strips.

activities.title: Compare Fractions
activities.description: Choose >, <, or = using visual help.

activities.title: Add Like Fractions
activities.description: Add fractions with the same denominator.

activities.title: Subtract Like Fractions
activities.description: Subtract fractions with the same denominator.

activities.title: Mixed Numbers Bridge
activities.description: Make and use mixed numbers and improper fractions.

activities.title: Fraction x Whole Number
activities.description: Multiply a fraction by a whole number as repeated addition.

activities.title: Fraction Word Problems
activities.description: Solve fraction stories (recipes, measuring, sharing).

levels.title: Decimals, Measurement & Data
levels.goal: Connect fractions to decimals (tenths/hundredths), convert units within a system, and solve measurement/data problems.

activities.title: Tenths & Hundredths Aquarium
activities.description: Build decimals using a 10x10 grid.

activities.title: Compare Decimals
activities.description: Choose >, <, or = for decimals to hundredths.

activities.title: Fraction to Decimal Match
activities.description: Match tenths/hundredths fractions to decimals.

activities.title: Unit Conversion Trail
activities.description: Convert units (like feet to inches, kg to g).

activities.title: Area & Perimeter Builder
activities.description: Build rectangles and find area and perimeter.

activities.title: Find the Missing Side
activities.description: Find a missing side length from area or perimeter.

activities.title: Line Plot with Fractions
activities.description: Make and read a line plot with 1/2 and 1/4 units.

activities.title: Measurement Word Problems
activities.description: Solve multi-step measurement stories.

levels.title: Angles & Shape Properties
levels.goal: Measure and draw angles, understand lines and symmetry, and classify shapes by properties.

activities.title: Points, Lines, Rays Explorer
activities.description: Identify points, lines, segments, and rays.

activities.title: Angle Types Zoo
activities.description: Sort angles into acute, right, or obtuse.

activities.title: Measure Angles
activities.description: Measure angles with a protractor tool.

activities.title: Draw an Angle
activities.description: Make an angle of a given size.

activities.title: Parallel & Perpendicular Streets
activities.description: Find parallel and perpendicular lines in a city map.

activities.title: Classify Quadrilaterals
activities.description: Classify squares, rectangles, rhombi, trapezoids, and kites.

activities.title: Symmetry Mirror
activities.description: Draw a line of symmetry (if it exists).

activities.title: Build a Shape Challenge
activities.description: Choose a shape that matches the clues.
